description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a tiled lot with a rectangular swimming pool in the front yard. The building features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, geometric design with white and black exterior walls. The lot is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing greenery around the structure. The main entrance is accessible from the tiled area, and there is a visible patio or deck area adjacent to the pool. The windows are arranged in a linear fashion, maximizing natural light and views of the outdoor space. The overall layout is open and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor living and minimalistic aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a front swimming pool, surrounded by landscaped trees on a tiled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the swimming pool, main entrance, and a clear view of the flat-roofed bungalow with black and white walls.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back patio area, additional trees, and the side of the bungalow with grouped windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extensive glass windows, white facade, and the pool area set further back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, more greenery, and the black and white color contrast of the bungalow's exterior.
